Our Story

Created from a
love for beautiful
gifting

Rosebella turns everyday occasions into something unforgettable with premium flowers, chocolates, and thoughtful presentation. Every bouquet is designed with care. Every delivery is made to bring a smile.

✦
Elegance Refined luxury in every detail
◈
Convenience Effortless gifting experience
♡
Emotion Gifts that speak for you
◇
Excellence Uncompromising quality
"We believe giving should feel effortless, yet truly special."
— Rosebella Mission

How It Works

The Rosebella
experience

01

Choose Your Gift

Browse our curated collections of fresh flowers, luxury chocolates, and bespoke arrangements.

02

Personalise It

Add a heartfelt message, select your packaging, and choose add-ons to make it truly yours.

03

We Deliver

Same-day delivery across Doha, Qatar. Track your order and schedule the perfect time.

04

Make It Memorable

Every gift arrives beautifully wrapped, ready to create a moment they will never forget.

Privacy Policy  ·  Delivery Policy

Admin Login
✦ Added to your gift bag
Rosebella

Delivery Policy

🚚 Same-Day Delivery

We are able to take delivery orders on the same day, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Simply place your order and our team will ensure your gift is delivered as soon as possible across Doha, Qatar.

📍 Delivery Areas

We currently deliver to all areas within Doha, Qatar and its surrounding regions (Lusail, Al Wakra, Al Khor, West Bay). For deliveries outside Doha, please contact us via WhatsApp to confirm availability and pricing.

⏰ Delivery Times

We are available 24 hours a day, every day of the year. Place your order at any time and we will deliver at your preferred time — no time restrictions, no delays across Doha, Qatar.

📦 Order Tracking

Once your order is dispatched, our delivery team will contact you via WhatsApp with live updates. You can also reach us at +974 33 446 618 for real-time tracking.

❌ Cancellations & Returns

Orders may be cancelled or modified up to 2 hours before the scheduled delivery time. As our products are perishable, we do not accept returns once delivered. If there is an issue with your order, please contact us within 24 hours and we will make it right.

🎁 Gift Packaging

All Rosebella orders are beautifully packaged with our signature wrapping at no extra charge. Premium gift boxes, ribbon, and personalised message cards are available upon request.
